description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean white exterior walls and large, dark-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The structure includes a prominent balcony area with glass railings on two sides, enhancing the sense of openness and providing outdoor living space. The interior layout is partially visible, revealing multiple rooms, a staircase, and a colorful wall mural that adds a touch of personality. The roof is flat, consistent with contemporary urban housing trends, and the window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, with large panes dominating the facade. The main entryway is accessible from the balcony, with wide glass doors that blend indoor and outdoor spaces. Overall, the house exudes a minimalist yet inviting urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, white house with large dark-framed windows, flat roof, and glass-railed balconies, featuring a clean, minimalist urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows and two glass-railed balconies.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting additional windows, the staircase inside, and the continuation of the balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view with smaller windows and a more enclosed appearance, showing the back rooms.
description_view_3: Side view with a visible colorful mural inside, glass doors, and another section of the balcony.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via wide glass doors on the balcony, no visible steps, minimalist with glass railings and no decorative columns.
